title: Smile Brighter with Ganpati Dental Clinic in Delhi
heading: Ganpati Dental Clinic (CGHS)
description: At Ganpati dental clinic experienced team of dental professionals is dedicated to providing high-quality care for all your oral health needs.

[email protected] ganpatidentalclinic.com Braces Procedure https://youtu.be/PDOJv1RLZnA Root Canal Treatment Procedure https://youtu.be/M0-7sLhG_es Tooth Cap/ Crown Procedure https://youtu.be/uFGQbqymFug Ganpati Dental’s Services Why Trust Ganpati Dental Thousands of Happy Patients Experienced Doctors & Staff 100% Safety and Sterilization What Our Patient Says? https://youtu.be/3pwJ2DgXH-Qhttps://youtu.be/6gLEiCxlnpYhttps://youtu.be/2RR72WskjfI Ganpati Dental Expertise Best Dental Clinic in Shalimar Bagh & Rohini, Delhi Ganpati Dental Clinic is a trusted, CGHS-empanelled dental clinic in Shalimar Bagh and Rohini, Delhi, offering advanced yet affordable dental care. The clinic is led by experienced dentists Dr. Rohit Sharma and Dr. Sucheta Sharma and is known for ethical treatment planning, modern technology, and high patient satisfaction. We provide complete dental solutions including dental implants, braces & aligners, root canal treatment, crowns & caps, cosmetic dentistry, smile makeovers, and pediatric dental care. CGHS beneficiaries can avail cashless dental treatment with a valid referral slip. With more than 10,000 treated patients and excellent Google reviews at both locations, Ganpati Dental Clinic is recognised as one of the most reliable dental clinics in North Delhi for long-term dental solutions. I’m dr. Rohit Sharma, I am the director of Ganpati Dental Clinic in Delhi, a centre for orthodontic and implant. We started this practice 10 years ago. I started along with my wife who’s a cosmetic dentist. Our dental clinic is an Advanced Dental Center, specifically providing exclusive treatments for cosmetic dentistry, dental implants, orthodontics, and root canals. We are dentist and implant surgeon, so we offer smile makeovers to people who have any kind of cosmetic problems whether it is crooked teeth, overlapping teeth, dark teeth, small teeth or teeth with gaps or oversized teeth or teeth with old fillings. So, basically, any adult who is willing to look for a better smile, we get it to them. And the best part about this is if people are not interested in going for an orthodontic treatment or braces which would take like a year or a year and a half to get the smile corrected, they can opt for a smile makeover which would take about a week or ten days. It would take just about four to five visits to complete the treatment so, we offer the best cosmetic dentistry in Delhi. And we have been doing this cosmetic work for the last 10 years now with a very high success rate and very very happy patients. You know up to 10000 patients have treated so far with really good results. Our Ganpati Dental clinic Center is dedicated to offering high-quality treatment and we offer a treatment which is painless and highly personalized so though all the patients will be attended to personally by either me or my wife and we take great care in know taking the individualized giving individual attention to these patients and taking care of their problems. Ganpati Dental also provide dental education to young dentists at GDS Dental Q. Which dental treatments are available at Ganpati Dental Clinic? We provide complete dental care including dental implants, braces and clear aligners, root canal treatment, crowns and caps, cosmetic dentistry, smile makeovers, teeth cleaning, pediatric dentistry, and preventive dental care. Q. Is Ganpati Dental Clinic CGHS empanelled? Yes, Ganpati Dental Clinic is a CGHS-empanelled dental clinic in Delhi. CGHS beneficiaries can avail eligible dental treatments on a cashless basis with a valid referral slip from their CGHS dispensary. Q. Do you have dental clinic branches in Shalimar Bagh and Rohini? Yes, Ganpati Dental Clinic has two fully equipped branches in Shalimar Bagh and Rohini , making it easily accessible for patients across North Delhi. Q. Is dental treatment painful? Most dental treatments today are minimally painful. At Ganpati Dental Clinic, we use modern equipment and advanced techniques to ensure maximum patient comfort during procedures like root canal treatment, dental implants, and braces. Q. How many patients have been treated at Ganpati Dental Clinic? We have successfully treated more than 10,000 patients over the years, with high success rates and excellent Google reviews at both clinic locations. Q. How can I book an appointment at Ganpati Dental Clinic? You can book an appointment by calling us, contacting us via WhatsApp, or by using the appointment booking option available on our website.
